mapper.select: insert into user_info (user_id, phone_no, status, hashed_password, gmt_create, gmt_modified, contact_config, user_name) values (#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{phoneNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hashedPassword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{contactConfig,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_info SET ext_info = #{extInfo}, gmt_modified = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_info SET user_name = #{userName}, gmt_modified = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
